3070510.name: Cat Clicker
3070510.description: Cat Clicker is an engaging indie game that blends addictive clicker gameplay with a unique skill leveling system. Players click to interact with adorable cats, earning points and progressing through the game. Skills are gained and leveled up by completing a variety of fun and challenging minigames. As players enhance their cat-related skills, they unlock new abilities and features, making the gameplay increasingly rewarding.
3070510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
